caption:
A Harvard Business Review study found the exact moment your competitor steals your lead.

Researchers audited 2,241 companies and timed how fast each one answered a real inquiry.

Companies that made contact within an hour were nearly 7x more likely to qualify the lead than firms that waited just one hour longer. Wait a full day and the odds drop more than 60x.

Most service businesses respond nowhere near that fast. Industry benchmarking puts the one-hour response rate below one in five.

That hour is where the job gets won, before the homeowner ever calls a third company.

Want every lead answered inside that window?

DM "SPEED".

#LeadResponseTime #ServiceBusinessMarketing #SpeedToLead #HomeServiceBusiness #ContractorMarketing
rationale: Fills the under-served Third-Party Research slot with a fresh, rigorously sourced academic study (distinct from the HubSpot stat already used), delivered as the carousel format research shows wins saves for authority/educational content.
